---
title: "Media & News"
execute:
  freeze: false
lightbox: true
---

This page collects Research Ring news, announcements, media appearances, and assets available for press use. For interview requests or other inquiries, use the contact form on the [Work With Us](public_work_with_us.qmd) page.

---

## Announcements

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| cache: false
source("_render_media.R")
render_section_html(read_media_entries(), "announcement")
```

---

## In the News

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| cache: false
source("_render_media.R")
render_section_html(read_media_entries(), "news")
```

---

## Podcasts & Interviews

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| cache: false
source("_render_media.R")
render_section_html(read_media_entries(), "podcast")
```
